zh.lifeSummary: 當René d'Anjou於1409年1月19日出生在法國安喬安格斯時，他的父親Louis II d'ANJOU31歲，母親Yolande d'ARAGON24歲。他於1420年10月20日與Isabelle De Lorraine在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年8月10日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯享年71歲，埋葬在法國安喬安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当René d'Anjou于1409年1月19日出生在法国安喬安格斯时，他的父亲Louis II d'ANJOU31岁，母亲Yolande d'ARAGON24岁。他于1420年10月20日与Isabelle De Lorraine在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年8月10日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯享年71岁，埋葬在法国安喬安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anjou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France (see Langevin ).

variants.name: Langevin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Henri, Jean-Louis, Pierre, Adelard, Emile, Gaston, Leodore, Lucien, Marcel.

French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', for an Angevin, i.e. for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France that was ruled by a count as an independent territory from the 10th century. The province became a property of the English Crown for fifty years at the end of the 12th century. Compare Longway and Lonsway .

History: Mathurin Langevin dit Lacroix from Le Lude in Sarthe, France, married Marie-Thérèse Martin in Quebec City, QC, in 1674. Michel Langevin from Paris, France, married Marguerite Guertin in Contrecoeur, QC, in 1714. Jean Bergevin dit Langevin from Angers in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Piton in Quebec City, QC, in 1668. Charles Citoleux/Sitoleux dit Langevin from Chambellay in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie-Louise Harel in Montreal, QC, in 1739.

nameMeanings.name: René
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Late Latin name Renatus ‘reborn’, used by early Christians as a baptismal name celebrating spiritual rebirth in Christ. It is found in the English-speaking world, especially North America, where it is usually written without the accent. It occurs occasionally as a girl's name, presumably a modified spelling of Renée or a short form of Irene and similar names.

en.lifeSummary: When René d'Anjou was born on 19 January 1409, in Angers, Anjou, France, his father, Louis II d'ANJOU, was 31 and his mother, Yolande d'ARAGON, was 24. He married Isabelle De Lorraine on 20 October 1420, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 10 August 1480, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 71, and was buried in Angers, Anjou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque René d'Anjou est né le 19 janvier 1409, à Angers, Anjou, France, son père, Louis II d'ANJOU, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Yolande d'ARAGON, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle De Lorraine le 20 octobre 1420, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1480, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Angers, Anjou, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als René d'Anjou am 19. Januar 1409 in Angers, Anjou, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis II d'ANJOU 31 und seine Mutter Yolande d'ARAGON 24. Er hat am 20. Oktober 1420 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich Isabelle De Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 10. August 1480 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Anjou, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando René d'Anjou è nato il il 19 gennaio 1409 nel Angers, Anjou, Francia, il suo padre, Louis II d'ANJOU, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Yolande d'ARAGON, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle De Lorraine il 20 ottobre 1420, nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1480, nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Angers, Anjou, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: René d'Anjouが1409年1月19日にフランスアンジョウアンジャーズで生まれた時，父Louis II d'ANJOUは31歳，母Yolande d'ARAGONは24歳であった。1420年10月20日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシでIsabelle De Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年8月10日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスで71歳で死去し，フランスアンジョウアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.Bourges, Cher, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스
ko.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스
ko.Château d'Angers, Angers, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스
ko.lifeSummary: René d'Anjou(이)가 1409년 1월 19일 프랑스 앤조우 앤그르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis II d'ANJOU(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande d'ARAGON(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1420년 10월 20일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 Isabelle De Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 8월 10일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 앤조우 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.19 January 1409–10 August 1480: 19 de janeiro de 1409–10 de agosto de 1480
pt.Bourges, Cher, Centre, France: Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, França
pt.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Château d'Angers, Angers, Pays de la Loi: Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando René d'Anjou nasceu em 19 de janeiro de 1409, em Angers, Anjou, França, seu pai, Louis II d'ANJOU, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Yolande d'ARAGON, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle De Lorraine em 20 de outubro de 1420, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1480, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Angers, Anjou, França.

ru.Château d'Angers, Angers, Pays de la Loi: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда René d'Anjou родился 19 января 1409 г. в местности ангирс, анджоу, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis II d'ANJOU было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Yolande d'ARAGON, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle De Lorraine 20 октября 1420 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 10 августа 1480 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ангирс, анджоу, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando René d'Anjou nació el 19 de enero de 1409, en Angers, Anjou, Francia, su papá, Louis II d'ANJOU, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Yolande d'ARAGON, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabelle De Lorraine el 20 de octubre de 1420, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1480, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Angers, Anjou, Francia.
